'''ganadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyocyst|pyocyst]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyocyst|pyocyst]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ganadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gænædhæth|gænædhæth]] || [[word:gænædhæj|gænædhæj]] || [[word:gænædhæsh|gænædhæsh]] || [[word:gænædhæ|gænædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gananadhath|gananadhath]] || [[word:gananadhaj|gananadhaj]] || [[word:gananadhash|gananadhash]] || [[word:gananadha|gananadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganadhath|ganadhath]] || [[word:ganadhaj|ganadhaj]] || [[word:ganadhash|ganadhash]] || [[word:ganadha|ganadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganafdhath|ganafdhath]] || [[word:ganafdhaj|ganafdhaj]] || [[word:ganafdhash|ganafdhash]] || [[word:ganafdhaf|ganafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ganadhatha|ganadhatha]] || [[word:ganadhaja|ganadhaja]] || [[word:ganadhasha|ganadhasha]] || [[word:ganadhaka|ganadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ganadhath|ganadhath]] || [[word:ganadhaj|ganadhaj]] || [[word:ganadhash|ganadhash]] || [[word:ganadha|ganadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ganadhathal|ganadhathal]] || [[word:ganadhajal|ganadhajal]] || [[word:ganadhashal|ganadhashal]] || [[word:ganadhakal|ganadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ganadhathatha|ganadhathatha]] || [[word:ganadhajaja|ganadhajaja]] || [[word:ganadhashasha|ganadhashasha]] || [[word:ganadhaka|ganadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ganadhathan|ganadhathan]] || [[word:ganadhajan|ganadhajan]] || [[word:ganadhashan|ganadhashan]] || [[word:ganadhakan|ganadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ganadhathaoro|ganadhathaoro]] || [[word:ganadhajaoro|ganadhajaoro]] || [[word:ganadhashaoro|ganadhashaoro]] || [[word:ganadhakaoro|ganadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
